summary: The test suite has critical flaws that would miss regressions and fail to validate core functionality. Major issues: (1) 'Parse-ArtifactData' tests a non-existent function; (2) 'Test-ArtifactRetention-MaxSize' doesn't call Invoke-CleanupPlan, just manually sorts data; (3) 'Invoke-CleanupPlan' test creates a manual hashtable instead of testing the function; (4) 'Invoke-Cleanup' tests don't verify function behavior or output; (5) Missing edge cases: empty artifacts, null sizes, multiple workflows, boundary conditions (size exactly at limit), conflicting policies, artifacts with identical timestamps. The tests are mostly happy-path assertions on data structures rather than validating actual function behavior. Few tests actually call the functions being tested, and those that do lack comprehensive assertions on policy combinations.
